name: test
description: Testes E2E Test - depende de playwright-core

scripts.test: npx rimraf reports/allure-results reports/playwright-report reports/test-results && playwright test
scripts.test:headed: npx rimraf reports/allure-results reports/playwright-report reports/test-results && playwright test --headed
scripts.report:allure:reset: npx rimraf reports/allure-results reports/allure-report && echo Historico e resultados limpos. Execute npm test para uma nova execucao.
